violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open packages of food in walk in freezer and uncovered food in walk in cooler.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor in walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed numerous items in walk in cooler and refrigeration drawers that were not date marked.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed bare wood on edges of shelving.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..)were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -Observed light shield in food prep area needs to be cleaned.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed hole in wall across from pantry.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
